# orm-public-app-permissions-get-mask-by-names

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the appPermissionsGetMaskByNames query

## Usage

```typescript
db.query.appPermissionsGetMaskByNames({ names: '<value>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run appPermissionsGetMaskByNames

```typescript
const result = await db.query.appPermissionsGetMaskByNames({ names: '<value>' }).execute();
```
